g.text: PHASE 5 — MANDATORY CLOSE SEQUENCE (ORDER IS CRITICAL)
ET MODE: read() loop until EAGAIN — missing drain = silent data loss
WARNING: epoll DEL MUST precede close(fd) — fd reuse race if reversed
fd_reuse race: close(fd) → OS recycles fd → new accept() reuses same fd number → stale epoll entry watches wrong conn
Total: 12 bytes | data.ptr avoids fd array lookup
0x0C | int | heap_idx // for O(log n) cancel
Total: 16 bytes | heap root = nearest expiry
